query:
_index=sec_record_endpoint
| where (user_username matches "*" or isEmpty(user_username)) and (device_ip matches "*" or isEmpty(device_ip)) and (srcDevice_ip matches "*" or isEmpty(srcDevice_ip)) and (dstDevice_ip matches "*" or isEmpty(dstDevice_ip)) and (device_hostname matches "*" or isEmpty(device_hostname))
| metadata_product as product
| metadata_sourceCategory as _sourceCategory
| %"fields.event.UserIp" as user_ip
| %"fields.event.OperationName" as operation_name
| %"fields.metadata.eventType" as event_type
| count by product, _sourceCategory, objectType, user_ip, operation_name, event_type
| sort by _count

sources.dashboardName: Cloud SIEM - Record Analysis - Endpoint Records
sources.dashboardDescription: This dashboard provides analysis of Endpoint Records.
